name: demo-org-hygiene-agent
description: Lightweight agent that monitors and maintains Salesforce demo org (SDO) environments for AMER, EMEA, and APAC events.

scripts.demo:after: sf apex run --file scripts/EnsureCurrentMonthOpportunities.apex --target-org sdo-amer; sf apex run --file scripts/EnsureOppActivity.apex --target-org sdo-amer; sf apex run --file scripts/EnsureOppNotes.apex --target-org sdo-amer; sf apex run --file scripts/RunPipelineManagementFlow.apex --target-org sdo-amer
scripts.demo: npm run demo:before && npm run demo:after
